content: agent2 here: implementing feat(mux) route hit monitoring/metrics. Will touch mux.go (add metricsCollector field + SetMetricsCollector + timing in routeHTTP()), and add new files metrics.go / metrics_test.go. Will try to keep mux.go changes minimal/additive. Thanks for the heads up. My change wraps h.ServeHTTP(w,r) in the FindRoute block with time.Now()/time.Since() when a metricsCollector is set (added metricsCollector field + SetMetricsCollector() method to Mux, new metrics.go/metrics_test.go). Only touching that block plus struct field/new method, so should merge cleanly with your setPathValues() line insertion in the same spot. Done and submitting now.
